heading: Ku-Ring-Gai Chase vs Kulnura — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ku-Ring-Gai Chase, New South Wales and Kulnura, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kulnura has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ku-Ring-Gai Chase (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ku-Ring-Gai Chase or Kulnura safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ku-Ring-Gai Chase has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kulnura scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ku-Ring-Gai Chase scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Kulnura scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ku-Ring-Gai Chase or Kulnura?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kulnura has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
